features.name: Foundation & Domain Models
features.description: Spatie installs (permission, activitylog, tags), Request/Customer/Category/Mailbox/Note models + enums, permission groups, factories, DemoSeeder, tour doc 01. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-1.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; migrate:fresh --seed builds the documented demo dataset; Foundation tests green; docs/tour/01-foundation.md demo script works

features.name: Ticket Management
features.description: Request queue + detail Livewire UI, assignment, public reply vs private note, activitylog history, saved Filters, canned Responses, domain events + assignment notification. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-2.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; Requests test suites green; docs/tour/02-ticket-management.md demo script runs start-to-finish

features.name: Shared Inbox & Email Pipeline
features.description: Resend outbound (threading headers) + inbound webhook (spatie/webhook-client), attachments via medialibrary, mail:replay command, POST /api/v1/requests intake channel. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-3.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; Inbox + Api tests green; mail:replay fixtures create/match requests; live Resend round-trip verified per docs/tour/03-shared-inbox.md

features.name: Self-Service Portal
features.description: Public portal layout, submit form, confirmation email with access key, email+key status lookup, customer replies. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-4.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; Portal tests green (incl. no private-note leak); docs/tour/04-portal.md demo script works

features.name: Knowledge Base
features.description: Knowledge Books → Chapters → Pages with sluggable URLs, drafts, admin manager, portal browsing + LIKE search. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-5.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; KnowledgeBase tests green; docs/tour/05-knowledge-base.md demo script works

features.name: Automation Rules
features.description: RuleEngine + Mail Rules (inbound pipeline), Triggers (domain events), scheduled Automation Rules (automation:run + scheduler), rule builder UI. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-6.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; Automation tests green incl. loop guard; all three seeded rule layers fire per docs/tour/06-automation.md demo script

features.name: Collision Detection
features.description: Laravel Reverb + Echo presence channels on request detail: viewer banner + live timeline updates. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-7.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; Collision tests green; two-browser presence demo works per docs/tour/07-collision-detection.md

features.name: Reporting
features.description: Reports page: stat cards, requests-over-time Flux chart, category SLA table, agent performance table, shared scopeSlaBreached. Spec: docs/ideation/helpstripe/spec-phase-8.md
features.done_when: ./init.sh passes; Reports tests green with exact expected aggregates; docs/tour/08-reporting.md demo script works against seeded data
